display.purpose: Live elapsed-time readout inside TimerDisplay only.

headline.purpose: Screen-level titles and SleepPredictionCard primary time value.

body.purpose: Main copy, supporting info, card descriptions.

label.purpose: Button labels, UPPERCASE section headers, chip text, badge text.

shadows.name: ambient-card
shadows.purpose: HistoryCard and home summary cards at rest. Swapped for 1dp outlineVariant border in dark mode.

shadows.name: active-selection
shadows.purpose: SideSelector selected tile and home summary cards with an active session.

motion.name: ease-out-quart
motion.purpose: Default easing for all state-driven color, elevation, and content transitions. 200-240ms duration.

motion.name: ease-out-linear
motion.purpose: animateContentSize fallback for cards with less dramatic state changes.

motion.name: tap-confirm-seq
motion.purpose: CueChip tap confirmation microinteraction. The only place spring-style motion appears.

motion.name: timer-pulse
motion.purpose: TimerDisplay pulse while session is running. Stops on pause.

motion.name: badge-pulse
motion.value: 0.82 to 1.18 scale + 0.58 to 1.0 alpha, 900ms EaseOutQuart infinite
motion.purpose: ActiveStatusBadge dot pulse while session is live. Stops on pause.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Full-width pill button for the primary action on a tracking screen.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #C2185B; color: #FFFFFF; padding: 16px 24px; font-family: system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.1px; border: none; border-radius: 50px; min-height: 48px; width: 100%; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.22s cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1), box-shadow 0.22s cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #A31550; box-shadow: 0 4px 16px rgba(194, 24, 91, 0.28); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid #F8BBD0; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-primary:active { background: #880E4F; transform: scale(0.98); }

components.name: Outline Button
components.description: Secondary action button with transparent fill and domain-colored border.
components.css: .ds-btn-outline { background: transparent; color: #1976D2; padding: 14px 24px; font-family: system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.1px; border: 2px solid #1976D2; border-radius: 50px; min-height: 48px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1); } .ds-btn-outline:hover { background: rgba(25, 118, 210, 0.08); } .ds-btn-outline:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid #B3E5FC; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-outline:active { background: rgba(25, 118, 210, 0.14); }

components.name: SideSelector Selected
components.description: Selected breast-side chooser tile. Carnation Pink fill with elevation jump.
components.css: .ds-side-selected { display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 6px; background: #C2185B; color: #FFFFFF; border: none; border-radius: 16px; height: 88px; flex: 1; cursor: pointer; box-shadow: 0 6px 16px rgba(0,0,0,0.22); font-family: system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.1px; }

components.name: SideSelector Unselected
components.description: Unselected breast-side tile. Warm cream fill with faint pink border.
components.css: .ds-side-unselected { display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 6px; background: #FFFDE7; color: #1A1A1A; border: 2px solid #F8BBD0; border-radius: 16px; height: 88px; flex: 1; cursor: pointer; font-family: system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.1px; }

components.name: History Card
components.description: Row-layout list item for session history. Badge + text column + trailing duration.
components.html:
🍼
Left breast10:32 AM
14m
components.css: .ds-history-card { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; background: #FFFDE7; border-radius: 16px; padding: 12px 14px; box-shadow: 0 1px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.10); margin-bottom: 4px; } .ds-history-badge { width: 44px; height: 44px; border-radius: 8px; background: #F8BBD0; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-size: 20px; flex-shrink: 0; } .ds-history-text { display: flex; flex-direction: column; flex: 1; gap: 2px; } .ds-history-title { font-family: system-ui; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 600; color: #1A1A1A; letter-spacing: 0.1px; } .ds-history-sub { font-family: system-ui; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 400; color: #6D6A64; letter-spacing: 0.4px; } .ds-history-trail { font-family: system-ui; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 400; color: #C2185B; white-space: nowrap; }

components.name: Home Summary Card — Idle
components.description: Idle home screen domain card. Container color fill, 1dp elevation, emoji + label.
components.css: .ds-summary-idle { background: #F8BBD0; border-radius: 24px; padding: 20px; min-height: 140px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 8px; box-shadow: 0 1px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.10); cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.22s cubic-bezier(0.25,1,0.5,1), box-shadow 0.24s cubic-bezier(0.25,1,0.5,1); } .ds-summary-row { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: flex-start; } .ds-summary-emoji { font-size: 28px; line-height: 1; } .ds-summary-label { font-family: system-ui; font-size: 18px; font-weight: 600; color: #880E4F; letter-spacing: 0.15px; } .ds-summary-sub { font-family: system-ui; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 400; color: #880E4F; letter-spacing: 0.25px; } .ds-summary-idle:hover { box-shadow: 0 3px 10px rgba(0,0,0,0.14); }

components.name: Home Summary Card — Active
components.description: Active session home card. Full role color fill, 6dp elevation, live timer.
components.css: .ds-summary-active { background: #C2185B; border-radius: 24px; padding: 20px; min-height: 140px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 8px; box-shadow: 0 6px 16px rgba(0,0,0,0.22); cursor: pointer; } .ds-summary-active-row { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: flex-start; } .ds-summary-emoji-active { font-size: 28px; line-height: 1; } .ds-active-badge { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 5px; background: #F8BBD0; border-radius: 50px; padding: 4px 8px; font-family: system-ui; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 500; color: #880E4F; letter-spacing: 0.5px; } .ds-dot { width: 7px; height: 7px; border-radius: 50%; background: #880E4F; animation: badge-pulse 0.9s ease-out infinite alternate; } @keyframes badge-pulse { from { transform: scale(0.82); opacity: 0.58; } to { transform: scale(1.18); opacity: 1; } } .ds-summary-active-label { font-family: system-ui; font-size: 18px; font-weight: 600; color: #FFFFFF; letter-spacing: 0.15px; } .ds-summary-active-time { font-family: system-ui; font-size: 22px; font-weight: 600; color: #FFFFFF; }

components.name: Sleep Prediction Card
components.description: Sleep window card on HomeScreen. Flat secondaryContainer background, confidence dots, multiple state variants.
components.html:
SLEEP PREDICTION

~9:45 PM

9:20 PM–10:10 PM
components.css: .ds-sleep-pred { background: #B3E5FC; border-radius: 24px; padding: 16px; width: 100%; } .ds-pred-header { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; margin-bottom: 10px; } .ds-pred-title-row { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; } .ds-pred-label { font-family: system-ui; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.8px; text-transform: uppercase; color: #1976D2; } .ds-conf-dots { display: flex; gap: 4px; align-items: center; } .ds-dot-filled { width: 8px; height: 8px; border-radius: 50%; background: #1976D2; } .ds-dot-empty { width: 8px; height: 8px; border-radius: 50%; background: rgba(25, 118, 210, 0.22); } .ds-pred-time { font-family: system-ui; font-size: 32px; font-weight: 700; color: #0D47A1; line-height: 1.1; margin: 0 0 2px; } .ds-pred-range { font-family: system-ui; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 400; color: rgba(13, 71, 161, 0.55); margin: 0; letter-spacing: 0.25px; }

components.name: Cue Chip
components.description: One-tap baby event chip in the CueQuickTapRow. Tap triggers a scale bounce and auto-deselects after 1.5s.
components.css: .ds-cue-chip { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 4px; background: transparent; color: #1A1A1A; font-family: system-ui; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.8px; border: 1px solid #CAC4D0; border-radius: 50px; padding: 8px 16px; cursor: pointer; white-space: nowrap; transition: background 0.16s ease, border-color 0.16s ease; } .ds-cue-chip:hover { background: rgba(194, 24, 91, 0.06); border-color: #C2185B; } .ds-cue-chip.selected { background: #F8BBD0; color: #880E4F; border-color: #F8BBD0; } .ds-cue-chip:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid #F8BBD0; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Allergy Chip
components.description: Display-only allergy tag in Settings. Non-interactive.
components.css: .ds-allergy-chip { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; background: #F8BBD0; color: #880E4F; font-family: system-ui; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.5px; border-radius: 8px; padding: 4px 12px; }

narrative.overview:
Akachan is a tool for care, not performance. Its design language answers one question: what does a parent need when one arm is occupied and exhaustion has blurred the edges of thought? Everything else is secondary. The visual system is warm and legible first; it carries personality through restraint, not decoration.

The palette anchors on a soft cream surface (#FFFDE7) that reads like a familiar page, not a product interface. Carnation Pink identifies feeding. Sleep Blue identifies rest. These are deliberate semantic assignments, not aesthetic preferences. The system's warmth lives in the surface and the containment colors; the action colors are decisive, dark enough to read instantly against any background the eye lands on.

The system explicitly rejects the aesthetics it competes against: clinical white-and-teal apps that feel like patient intake forms, loud baby-brand UIs saturated with primary colors and bubble fonts, and fitness-tracker dashboards that treat care as a performance metric. Akachan does not count reps. It records moments.
keyCharacteristics: Warm cream (#FFFDE7) as the single app surface — no alternating backgrounds
Semantic color assignment: Pink = Feeding, Blue = Sleep, Green = over-limit threshold and Pumping
Generous touch targets (88dp interactive height for primary selectors; 48dp for buttons)
System font (Roboto on Android) set across all weights; personality through weight contrast
Elevation communicates state, not hierarchy; surfaces are flat at rest
Dark mode is a first-class citizen, tuned for 3am low-light legibility
Home screen uses a 2x2 summary card grid where active sessions animate color and elevation in real time

rules.name: The Semantic Assignment Rule
rules.body: Carnation Pink is the feeding color. Sleep Blue is the sleep color. Threshold Green is the over-limit and pumping color. They never appear as decorative interchangeables.

rules.name: The No Pure White Rule
rules.body: The app surface is always Warm Cream (#FFFDE7). Pure white (#FFFFFF) appears only as text on filled Carnation Pink or Sleep Blue buttons; it is not a background value.

rules.name: The Direct Import Rule
rules.body: Warning tokens (WarningAmber, WarningContainerAmber, OnWarningContainerAmber and their dark variants) must be imported by name from Color.kt. Never access them through MaterialTheme.colorScheme.

rules.name: The ExtraBold Timer Rule
rules.body: displaySmall (36sp ExtraBold) is used exclusively for the live elapsed-time readout inside TimerDisplay. Assigning it to any other text element collapses the hierarchy.

rules.name: The UPPERCASE Header Rule
rules.body: Day-group headers in history lists and the SleepPredictionCard section label use labelMedium with uppercase text. This is the only context where uppercase text appears in the system.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest. Shadows appear only in response to user-initiated state change.

rules.name: The Dark Mode Swap Rule
rules.body: Ambient shadows (1dp) are not visible on dark surfaces. Swap them explicitly for an outlineVariant border stroke (1dp) in dark mode.

rules.name: The Two-Step Vocabulary Rule
rules.body: The system has exactly two active elevation steps: 1dp ambient and 6dp selected. A third step breaks the grammar.

rules.name: The Outline-Border Pattern
rules.body: When a card is informational (not actionable, not domain-colored), use a 1dp outlineVariant border on the surface color instead of a container fill.

dos: Do use Warm Cream (#FFFDE7) for all app backgrounds.
Do assign color by domain: Carnation Pink for feeding, Sleep Blue for sleep, Threshold Green for pumping and limit-exceeded states.
Do use pill shape (50dp) for primary buttons and large radius (24dp) for home summary cards; medium radius (16dp) for history cards and selector tiles.
Do give all primary interactive elements a minimum 48dp tap height. SideSelector-style tiles: 88dp.
Do replace ambient card shadows with outlineVariant border strokes (1dp, #CAC4D0) in dark mode.
Do use LabelMedium (12sp Bold, 0.8sp tracking, uppercase) for day-group headers and section labels inside cards.
Do communicate an active session visually at screen level via ActiveStatusBadge, a banner, or TimerDisplay.
Do access Warning tokens by importing directly from Color.kt.
Do treat dark mode as a first-class requirement with explicit color assignments.
Do use tween(200-240ms, EaseOutQuart) for all state-driven color and elevation transitions.
donts: Don't build clinical white or sterile layouts.
Don't use oversaturated cartoon palettes, bubble fonts, or primary-color noise.
Don't treat tracking as a performance metric — no concentric stat rings, no dashboard hero metrics.
Don't use gradient text or background-clip: text decorative effects.
Don't use side-stripe borders wider than 1dp as colored card accents.
Don't reach for a modal dialog as the first editing solution.
Don't introduce shadows deeper than 6dp or multi-layer shadow compositions.
Don't use Carnation Pink and Sleep Blue interchangeably or on the same surface as stylistic choices.
Don't use FontFamily.Default at displaySmall for anything other than the live timer readout.
Don't animate layout properties or use bounce/elastic easing for transitions.
